title: Wellington Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Wellington, including discounts on activities, accommodation, and travel insurance, to make your family holiday more affordable and fun.
intro: Wellington is a fantastic destination for families, with a wide range of activities and attractions to suit all ages. To help you make the most of your family holiday, we've put together some of the best deals and discounts available in Wellington. From activity discounts to accommodation deals, we've got you covered.

sections.heading: Current Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
There are some great deals available in Wellington right now, including discounts on activities, accommodation, and travel insurance. Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in other major NZ cities, and while these deals aren't specific to Wellington, they can still help you save money on your overall holiday. Discover Cars is offering family campervans from $89/day, which can be a great option for families who want to explore the region.

Booking.com is offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings, which can give you peace of mind when booking your accommodation. And if you're planning to travel internationally, Cover-More's family travel insurance can provide comprehensive cover from just $4.50/day.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Wellington has a wide range of activities and attractions that are great for families, and many of them are very affordable. Te Papa Museum is free to visit, and the Wellington Cable Car is a great way to see the city. The Zealandia Wildlife Sanctuary and Carter Observatory are also highly recommended, and offer great value for money.

If you're looking for some free activities to add to your itinerary, the Wellington Waterfront and Frank Kitts Park playground are great options. The Botanical Garden is also free to visit, and offers a beautiful spot for a picnic or a walk.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips
sections.body: Here are some tips to help you save money on your family holiday in Wellington:
list: Book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices
Consider visiting during the off-season (April-May or September-October) when prices are lower
Pack a picnic lunch instead of buying food at cafes or restaurants
Take advantage of free activities like the Wellington Waterfront and Botanical Garden
Use public transport or walk instead of taking taxis or driving
Look for package deals that include accommodation and activities

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on your family holiday in Wellington, it's a good idea to book your activities and accommodation as far in advance as possible. Many attractions and accommodation providers offer early bird discounts or special deals for bookings made well in advance.

It's also a good idea to be flexible with your travel dates, as prices can vary depending on the time of year and day of the week. Consider visiting during the off-season (April-May or September-October) when prices are lower, or avoiding peak season (December-February) when prices are highest.
